channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-18 — NORMAL · Gold: CAT
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▼ 0.1% · VIX 18.5

The VIX is flatlining at 18.

🥇 Gold Pick: CAT — Score: 48/100 (A)

📡 169 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Bull markets make you money. Bear markets make you smart. Sideways markets make you drink." — Sam
